app.name: OneLauncher
app.one_liner: A Tauri-based monorepo for Minecraft launchers (OneLauncher and OneClient) with shared Rust/TypeScript core logic, supporting mod loaders like Fabric and Forge.

screens.name: Main Launcher Screen
screens.purpose: Display available Minecraft installations, allow launching, and provide access to mod management and settings.

screens.name: Onboarding Flow
screens.purpose: Guide new users through initial setup, including version selection and migration from older clients.

rust_commands.name: migrate_installation
rust_commands.purpose: Handle migration of legacy Minecraft installations to the new 26.x versioning scheme with updated loader support.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist user-modified items such as mod configurations or installation metadata to the SQLite database.

mvp_plan: week 1: Create main screen UI with Tanstack Router navigation
week 1: Implement basic SQLite schema for installations and mods
week 1: Set up Tauri + React scaffold with shared core
week 2: Integrate Sea ORM for Rust-DB communication
acceptance_tests: Dragging a mod file into OneClient adds it to the active installation without overwriting unrelated files.
During onboarding, existing clusters are automatically detected and offered for migration.
On Linux with Wayland, OneClient starts without crashing.
